Rain of Karana
Lore Item No Trade Quest Item
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY

Race: NONE

Item Type:Misc
Stackable:No

Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-20 03:47:03
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 45
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

East Karana
NPC Name
Tarbul Earthstrider

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Lake Rathetear
Quest Name
Magician Epic: Orb of Mastery

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
East Karana


Uploaded November 27th, 2008

Post Comment
Rain of Karana
QuoteReply
# Dec 04 2006 at 8:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1694996208315
31 posts
Was here for my part of my ranger epic in E. Karana and he got us just after the dark elf corruptor and reavers were taken down. "Rain of Karana" was the only loot he had on him.

So yes it still drops :D
▲ Page top
Just Killed him
QuoteReply
# Jul 05 2005 at 12:47 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591839901034
59 posts
Just killed him. Took a long time to solo him as I was low on mana when he jumped me, but was able to root and dot him to death. Did drop the rain of karana. EK seemed odd though. Lots of Hill Giants, would kill one and the one would pop within a minute.
▲ Page top
MQ able?
QuoteReply
# May 16 2005 at 10:44 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593362390308
20 posts
Just wondering but can this be MQed?
Looted one earlier and was wondering if I could MQ it for a mage in the guild, who wasn't on when Tarbul spawned.
▲ Page top
Still drops ^_^
QuoteReply
# Apr 11 2005 at 1:21 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752206826
Scholar
40 posts
I killed him today (4-11-05) and he did drop the Rain of Karana. I am a 55 Druid, and the fight wasnt too hard. He did take more than my entire mana pool (3575), but if you snare him, you can run away and med up a little. Alone he took me about 5 - 7 minutes. (Broon decided to jump into the middle of the fight, so I just HAD to exlode him.) He also dropped about 35pp. I didnt know what he was for, just getting a little revenge for when I was just a little druid-lett and he would chase me out of the zone (hehe). But unless you are going after him for the epic piece, he isnt really worth going after. Hope this helps anyone ^_^

Edited, Mon Apr 11 14:23:16 2005
▲ Page top
mage epic quest

__DEL__1591787276335
2 posts
Took out Tarbul 12-17-2004 at 7:27 am est on brell server 51 mage and 51 druid and a 47 cleric a little over kill tho but friends helped took him down in about 2 minutes maybe less

is this still dropped - I haven't seen hill giants in ek for afew days now.....

# Oct 14 2004 at 7:26 PM Rating: Decent

Scholar

Dropped today, October 14 2004. Unfortunately I was alone in the zone. Tarbul jumped me while I was farming tradeskill supplies... Oh, HG's are still there too.

# Jul 11 2004 at 12:25 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251188342
2 posts
Also very late, but just to keep everyone updated, I killed Tarbul Earthstrider today (with the help of a very kind troubadour!) and Rain of Karana dropped. Unfortunately, no mages in zone. Anyway, as of July 11, 2004, it does still drop!

Paragrine
48 Druid of Tunare
Xegony Server

# May 21 2004 at 4:35 PM Rating: Decent

Just killed him today and dropped the rain of karana.
▲ Page top
RE: where are the giants in rath?
QuoteReply
# Mar 01 2004 at 1:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250761715
View User Forum
Scholar
32 posts
A bit late on the reply, but wanted to add that I killed him last night and he dropped Rain of Karana. Luckily there was a mage in the zone so it didn't go to waste. About 20 seconds later I saw another HG, so they still definitely roam EK. It's been my experience that HGs only show up in daylight.

I have read in the past that killing a rogue lion has something to do with his spawning. I killed a rogue lion during the "night" immediately preceding his appearance the following "morning" so there may be something to this. It may also be coincidence.

For those who care about such things, he was light blue to me and an easy kill. I had no resists with the following strategy:

65 Necro, 63 Pet (rogue)
Pulled with Devouring Darkness
Pet
Invoke Fear
Funeral Pyre
Refeared
Redarked

I didn't really need to do the last dark, but since I hadn't ever taken him on before I decided to be conservative.
▲ Page top
RE: where are the giants in rath?
